subcodes.first_line: O Persian friends! Though through the faithlessness of your countrymen ye were made wanderers, bewildered and distracted, in mountain and desert [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران پارسی هر چند از نادرستی هموطنان آواره و سرگشته کوه و بیابان شدید ولی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for martyrs, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
